meaning: v.高飞,高丛,滑翔,剧增,昂扬n.高飞范围,高涨程度
examples: His market share continues to soar.
The eagle can soar without flapping their wings.
Most animals seek shade when temperatures in the Sahara Desert soar to 120 degrees Fahrenheit.
Simmons (interviewed, but excluded from the article) insisted plenitude was a mirage and prices were set to soar.
Flood warnings remain in effect at several locations on the River Soar in Leicestershire.
